subject.management_quality.desc: Leadership track record, capital allocation discipline, and insider alignment

legal.label: Legal
legal.signupAgreement: By creating an account you agree to our <terms>Terms of Service</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.
legal.terms.title: Terms of Service
legal.terms.intro: Welcome to StockPro. These Terms of Service govern your use of the StockPro website, app, and related services. By using StockPro you agree to these terms.
legal.terms.disclaimer: StockPro provides AI-generated research and educational content only. Nothing on this platform is financial, investment, tax, or legal advice. AI outputs may be incomplete or incorrect. You alone are responsible for every trading and investment decision and you bear all risk of loss. Always consult a licensed professional before acting on any information you find here.
legal.terms.sections.acceptance.title: Acceptance and accounts
legal.terms.sections.acceptance.body:
By creating an account or using StockPro you confirm that you are at least 18 years old and able to enter a binding agreement. Authentication is provided by Clerk; you are responsible for keeping your credentials safe and for all activity under your account.

If you do not agree to any part of these terms, do not use the service.
legal.terms.sections.service.title: What StockPro provides
legal.terms.sections.service.body: StockPro is an AI-powered research platform offering investment research reports, portfolio tracking, watchlists, and price alerts for stocks and crypto. Features and limits depend on your plan and may change as the product evolves. We make no guarantee of uptime, accuracy, or continued availability of any specific feature.
legal.terms.sections.acceptableUse.title: Acceptable use
legal.terms.sections.acceptableUse.body:
You agree not to: scrape or bulk-download data from the service; resell, redistribute, or republish research reports or AI outputs; abuse the AI agents through automated or excessive requests; reverse engineer or attempt to extract underlying prompts or models; use the service to violate any law or harm others.

We may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these rules.
legal.terms.sections.subscriptions.title: Subscriptions and billing
legal.terms.sections.subscriptions.body:
Paid plans are billed through Lemon Squeezy, our merchant of record. Subscriptions renew automatically at the end of each billing period until you cancel. You can cancel at any time from your account settings; cancellation takes effect at the end of the current period and you keep access until then.

Prices, plans, and features may change with notice. Refunds are governed by our Refund Policy.
legal.terms.sections.intellectualPropert: The StockPro brand, software, design, and underlying systems are owned by us. Research reports generated for you are licensed for your personal, non-commercial use. You retain ownership of the data you enter (portfolios, transactions, notes); by entering it you grant us a limited license to process it solely to provide the service.
legal.terms.sections.liability.title: Disclaimers and limitation of liability
legal.terms.sections.liability.body:
The service is provided "as is" and "as available" with no warranties of any kind, express or implied. We do not warrant that the service will be uninterrupted, error-free, or that AI outputs will be accurate or suitable for any purpose.

To the maximum extent permitted by law, our total liability for any claim arising from the service is limited to the fees you paid us in the 12 months before the claim. We are not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages, including trading losses.
legal.terms.sections.termination.title: Termination and changes
legal.terms.sections.termination.body:
You can stop using StockPro and delete your account at any time. We may suspend or terminate accounts for violation of these terms or to protect the service.

We may update these terms from time to time. Material changes will be announced in-app or by email. Continued use after changes means you accept the updated terms.
legal.terms.sections.governingLaw.title: Governing law
legal.terms.sections.governingLaw.body:
These terms are governed by the laws of the State of Israel. Any dispute will be brought exclusively before the competent courts of Tel Aviv-Jaffa, Israel.

StockPro is operated by Or Salinas, sole proprietor, Israel.
legal.privacy.title: Privacy Policy
legal.privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains what information StockPro collects, how we use it, and the choices you have. StockPro is operated by Or Salinas, sole proprietor (Israel). Contact: ojs.stockpro@gmail.com.
legal.privacy.sections.operator.title: Who we are
legal.privacy.sections.operator.body: StockPro is operated by Or Salinas, an independent sole proprietor based in Israel. For any privacy question or request, email ojs.stockpro@gmail.com.
legal.privacy.sections.dataCollected.bod:
Account data: email address and name, managed by our auth provider (Clerk). Email is stored encrypted at rest using AES-256-GCM, with a hash-based lookup so we never search by plain-text email.

User-entered data: portfolios, transactions, holdings, watchlists, notes, and the research reports you request. This is stored in PostgreSQL hosted on Supabase, with row-level security so each user can only access their own data.

Usage data: standard server logs (IP, timestamp, request path) for security and debugging.
legal.privacy.sections.subprocessors.bod:
We rely on a small set of trusted providers to run StockPro:

Clerk - authentication and account management.

Supabase - PostgreSQL database hosting.

Google (Gemini API) - AI inference for research reports. The contents of your research prompts and ticker selections are sent to Google to generate output.

Lemon Squeezy - payments and subscriptions (merchant of record). They process your card details; we only receive subscription status and order metadata.
legal.privacy.sections.retention.title: Data retention
legal.privacy.sections.retention.body: We keep your data for as long as your account is active. If you delete your account, we delete your personal data within 30 days, except where we are legally required to keep records (for example, tax invoices for paid subscriptions).
legal.privacy.sections.rights.title: Your rights
legal.privacy.sections.rights.body: You can request access to your personal data, ask us to correct or delete it, or request an export. Email ojs.stockpro@gmail.com from your account email and we will respond within a reasonable time.
legal.privacy.sections.cookies.title: Cookies and local storage
legal.privacy.sections.cookies.body: We use cookies and browser local storage for essential things only: keeping you signed in (Clerk session) and remembering your app preferences (such as language). We do not use third-party advertising or tracking cookies.
legal.privacy.sections.children.title: Children
legal.privacy.sections.children.body: StockPro is intended for users 18 years and older. We do not knowingly collect data from anyone under 18. If you believe a minor has created an account, contact us and we will remove it.
legal.privacy.sections.changes.title: Changes to this policy
legal.privacy.sections.changes.body: We may update this policy as the product evolves. Material changes will be announced in-app or by email. The "Last updated" date at the top of this page reflects the current version.
legal.refund.title: Refund Policy
legal.refund.intro: We want you to feel confident trying StockPro. This page explains exactly how refunds work.
legal.refund.sections.guarantee.title: 14-day money-back guarantee
legal.refund.sections.guarantee.body: We offer a 14-day, no-questions-asked refund on your first paid subscription. If StockPro is not the right fit, just email us within 14 days of your initial purchase and we will refund you in full.
legal.refund.sections.howToRequest.title: How to request a refund
legal.refund.sections.howToRequest.body: Email ojs.stockpro@gmail.com from the email on your StockPro account. Include your order ID from Lemon Squeezy if you have it (it speeds things up). We process refunds within 7 business days through Lemon Squeezy back to your original payment method.
legal.refund.sections.afterWindow.title: After the 14-day window
legal.refund.sections.afterWindow.body: After 14 days, subscription fees are non-refundable. You can cancel any time from your account settings to stop future renewals; you keep access until the end of the period you already paid for.
legal.refund.sections.freeTier.title: Free tier
legal.refund.sections.freeTier.body: The free tier is, well, free. There is nothing to refund.
legal.refund.sections.disputes.title: Disputed or fraudulent charges
legal.refund.sections.disputes.body: If you see a charge you do not recognize, email us first at ojs.stockpro@gmail.com before opening a chargeback. We can almost always resolve it directly within a day or two.
